metadata.uacp.test.comment: Exercises redactions + vendor-namespaced metadata round-trip. Strict validators accept metadata.com.acme.* but reject siblings-of-defined-fields. Writers MUST preserve unknown metadata keys on re-emit.

messages.content: My API key is [REDACTED:credential:0] and my card ending [REDACTED:financial:0].
I can't see those values — they've been redacted by your policy. Please share placeholders or non-sensitive context.
